Text.Page:
,
I hope this missive finds you in good health, for I am in urgently in need of your aid.

The noctenium fleet is overdue, and we believe it may have foundered on the rocks of Basilisk Reef, just off the Jagged Coast, during a heavy storm. We have sent ships to investigate, but they, too, have failed to return.

The noctenium ore the fleet was carrying is quite valuable, so I am prepared to offer you a significant reward if you can help me locate the ships and secure the cargo.

I will meet you at Basilisk Reef, and we can begin our search from there.

- Taylor, Federation Fleet Supply

Thank you for your help, . If you hadn't come, I would still be stranded out here, surrounded by these monstrously-transformed crewmen—and the noctenium would've been lost forever.

You have more than earned this reward.
